metrics.command_line: export PYTHON_EGG_CACHE=`pwd` &&   (macs2 callpeak   -t '/galaxy/server/database/objects/f/1/e/dataset_f1e8873c-93da-4336-b915-3916241ebe92.dat'  --name forward_and_reverse    --format BAMPE   --gsize '2913022398'      --SPMR     --call-summits  --keep-dup '1'  --d-min 20 --buffer-size 100000  --bdg  --qvalue '0.05'  --mfold '5' '50'  --bw '300'  2>&1 > macs2_stderr) && cp forward_and_reverse_peaks.xls '/galaxy/server/database/jobs_directory/000/163/outputs/dataset_71cfa0e7-a8f7-4edb-b12d-bd33a709fe32.dat'   && ( count=`ls -1 forward_and_reverse* 2>/dev/null | wc -l`; if [ $count != 0 ]; then mkdir '/galaxy/server/database/jobs_directory/000/163/outputs/dataset_23bc9567-b0f7-463f-b45a-5e691694b85f_files' && cp -r forward_and_reverse* '/galaxy/server/database/jobs_directory/000/163/outputs/dataset_23bc9567-b0f7-463f-b45a-5e691694b85f_files' && python '/cvmfs/cloud.galaxyproject.org/tools/toolshed.g2.bx.psu.edu/repos/iuc/macs2/86e2413cf3f8/macs2/dir2html.py' '/galaxy/server/database/jobs_directory/000/163/outputs/dataset_23bc9567-b0f7-463f-b45a-5e691694b85f_files' macs2_stderr > '/galaxy/server/database/jobs_directory/000/163/outputs/dataset_23bc9567-b0f7-463f-b45a-5e691694b85f.dat'; fi; ) && exit_code_for_galaxy=$? && cat macs2_stderr 2>&1 && (exit $exit_code_for_galaxy)
